name: harold-grayblood
description: Cowork plugin for Harold Grayblood — scribe of the chronicle, keeper of the ledger.

commands.name: new-episode
commands.description: Open a new chapter in the chronicles of Harold Grayblood.

commands.name: draft-idea
commands.description: Mark a new thought in the ledger before it fades.

commands.name: journal-entry
commands.description: Set quill to parchment. Record what the road demanded.
